description: Creates a user journey within a Resilience Hub system.

SystemIdentifier.description: The system ARN or system ID that owns this user journey.
SystemIdentifier.markdownDescription:
The system ARN or system ID that owns this user journey.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Update requires: Replacement

UserJourneyId.markdownDescription:
The server-generated user journey ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^\S{1,255}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.description: The name of the user journey.
Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the user journey.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9 _\-]{1,59}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.description: The description of the user journey.
Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the user journey.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 500  
Update requires: No interruption

PolicyArn.description: The ARN of the resilience policy to associate with this user journey.
PolicyArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the resilience policy to associate with this user journey.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user journey was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the user journey was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user journey was last updated.
UpdatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the user journey was last updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
